releaseNotes.title: Release Notes
releaseNotes.description: Discover the latest features, improvements, and bug fixes added to Watch Rudra.

updateForm.publicLinkFailed: Failed to copy public profile link

publicIdentity.title: Public Identity
publicIdentity.description: Share your watching legacy publicly via your unique ID.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be reversed. All your data, watchlist, history, and preferences will be permanently wiped from the server.

preferences.title: App Preferences
preferences.themeDescription: Switch between light mode and dark mode for optimal viewing comfort.
preferences.launchDescription: Automatically start Watch Rudra silently in the background when your computer boots up.
preferences.maxConcurrentDescription: How many movies or episodes can be downloaded at the same time. Default is 3.
preferences.downloadSpeedDescription: Restrict the background download speed. Helpful if your network slows down globally!
